title: BigChadGuys Plus, Vol. 2 Music Discs
description: The BigChadGuys Plus (Original Game Soundtrack) as music discs!
body:
A simple mod that introduces all the amazing songs composed for BigChadGuys Plus by [@bndf88](https://open.spotify.com/artist/3g17Z2B27k2RogCyjtunpV).

Currently included tracks:

- Waltz for the Lilies
- Voyagers
- Blessings
- Beginning of Infinity
- Planes in Space
- joe theme
- Departure
- Arrival
  
Support the artist by streaming his music on your favorite platforms!

- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/album/2pf8MuPrXg6uWz13TnIxbA)
- [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/us/album/bigchadguys-plus-vol-2-original-game-soundtrack/1765066036)  
- [Amazon](https://music.amazon.com/albums/B0DF74FJ2M)
